title: JPMorgan Launches Blockchain-Based Deposit Token for Institutional Settlement
snippet: JPMorgan Chase has launched a blockchain-based deposit token enabling institutional clients to settle transactions in seconds rather than the traditional T+2 settlement cycle.

title: BlackRock Tokenized Treasury Fund Surpasses $1 Billion in Assets Under Management
snippet: BlackRock BUIDL fund has become the first tokenized treasury fund to exceed one billion dollars in AUM, marking a milestone for institutional adoption of on-chain assets.

title: Circle Expands USDC to Solana and Arbitrum Networks
snippet: Circle has announced the expansion of USDC stablecoin to Solana and Arbitrum, bringing faster settlement to two major blockchain ecosystems.

title: Stripe Partners With Coinbase for Crypto On-Ramp Integration
snippet: Stripe and Coinbase have partnered to enable crypto on-ramp functionality for millions of online merchants through a simple API integration.

title: Small DeFi Protocol Launches Yield Farming Feature
snippet: A small DeFi protocol has launched a new yield farming feature.
